# Retrospective Report Template

Use this structure for sprint, release, incident, PR-train, or workflow retrospectives.

```markdown
# Retrospective: <scope>

## Executive summary

## Scope and timeframe

## Source facts used

## Timeline

## What worked

## What failed or slowed delivery

## Root causes and contributing factors

## Metrics and signals

## Action items

| id | action | owner | priority | due window | evidence | downstream handoff |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|

## Open questions

## Unresolved risks

## Follow-up handoff notes
```

Keep the report evidence-backed. Mark uncertain conclusions as hypotheses.
